page.name: A list of online collaboration tools
page.content: <script src="https://groups.diigo.com/user_mana/link_roll_data?group_name=sync-environments-tools&icon=true&width=250&count=15&title=Tools%20for%20facilitating%20learning%20in%20synchronous%20environments&tags=&token=" type="text/javascript"></script> <noscript><a href="https://groups.diigo.com/group/sync-environments-tools" >Tools for facilitating learning in synchronous environments</a></noscript>
